next_steps: Perform serologic testing for syphilis (RPR/VDRL and Treponema pallidum particle agglutination test)
Obtain ANCA (PR3 and MPO) and ANA panel
Perform biopsy of skin lesion and nasal mucosa
Measure serum ferritin, complement levels (C3, C4), and inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR)
Request ENT consultation for formal visualization and tissue sampling of nasal/oral ulcers
Order laboratory evaluation for complete blood count (monitoring for anemia/cytopenias) and metabolic panel
